components.name: Status Bar
components.description: Displays system information at the top of the screen.

components.name: App Header
components.description: Persistent top bar with brand logo and global actions.

components.name: Story/Post Creation Bar

elements.label: Text Input Hint
elements.action: Tap to create a new post

components.description: Area for quick content creation, showing user's profile and a prompt.

components.name: Stories Carousel
components.description: Horizontally scrollable section displaying user stories, with an option to create a new one.

components.name: News Feed Post

elements.label: Post Image
elements.image_content: Woman putting money in pocket, children watching

components.description: A single post in the news feed, including author info, reactions, media, and caption.

components.name: Bottom Navigation Bar
components.description: Persistent navigation at the bottom for quick access to core app sections.

layout_structure: The screen follows a top-to-bottom vertical stacking layout for its main sections: Status Bar, App Header, Story/Post Creator, Stories Carousel, and News Feed posts. The Stories Carousel introduces a horizontal scrolling dimension within its section. The Bottom Navigation Bar is fixed horizontally at the bottom of the screen. Within the App Header and Story/Post Creator, elements are arranged horizontally. News Feed posts are structured vertically, with a distinct header, reactions, media, and caption stacked within each post block.

color_scheme.primary_brand_color: #1877F2 (Facebook Blue) - used for logo, active home icon, create story button

text_colors.primary: #1C1E21 (Dark Grey/Black) - for main text like time, names, captions

typography.font_family: Sans-serif (likely system font or FB Sans)

font_sizes_relative.medium: User names, post captions, bottom nav labels

typography.text_alignment: Left-aligned for most text, center-aligned for bottom navigation labels under icons.

spacing_and_density.vertical_spacing: Generous spacing between major sections (header, story creator, stories, post). Each post in the feed is a distinct block with internal padding. Bottom navigation is compact.
spacing_and_density.horizontal_spacing: Consistent padding from screen edges. Elements within the header and bottom nav are evenly distributed. Stories carousel items have a moderate gap.
spacing_and_density.density: The header and story creator sections are moderately dense. The stories carousel is dense horizontally. The news feed post is vertically dense, especially due to the large image. The bottom navigation bar is quite dense with six items.
spacing_and_density.whitespace_usage: Effective use of whitespace around the logo, search bar, and post components to improve readability and visual hierarchy.

accessibility_observations: Good color contrast for primary text on white backgrounds.
Interactive elements (icons, buttons) appear to have adequate tap target sizes.
Notification badges use both color (red) and numerical indicators, aiding users with color vision deficiencies.
Text sizes are varied, with primary content being readable, though some smaller text (e.g., bottom nav labels) might be challenging for users with visual impairments without scaling options.
Localization is evident with Sinhala text, enhancing accessibility for native speakers.
Standard and recognizable icon usage improves comprehension.
notable_patterns: Standard social media feed (infinite scroll implied).
Persistent header with brand, search, and core actions.
Persistent bottom navigation bar for primary app sections.
Circular profile pictures for user identity.
Card-based layout for individual stories and posts.
Emoji-based reactions directly visible on posts.
Input field with 'What's on your mind?' prompt for content creation.
